languages.text: "Никак нет, Ваша Светлость! Приказ поступил от полковника, а вы, пока что, не наш командир".
"Negative, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! The order came from the colonel, and you are not, as of yet, our commander."
languages.original_text: "Никак нет, Ваша Светлость! Приказ поступил от полковника, а вы, пока что, не наш командир".

traits.locale_text: "Negative, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! The order came from the Colonel, and you are not, as of yet, our commander."
"Negative, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! The order came from the colonel, and you are not, as of yet, our commander."
"I fear we're at an impasse here. This order comes from the colonel, and I won't waver in the face of danger or your authority."
"Negative, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! The order came from the Colonel, and you are not, as of yet, our commander."
"Negative, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! The order came from the colonel, and you are not, as of yet, our commander."

languages.text: 「ここで行き詰まっているようです。この命令は将校からのもので、危険やあなたの権限に屈することはありません」
languages.original_text: "I fear we're at an impasse here. This order comes from the colonel, and I won't waver in the face of danger or your authority."

traits.locale_text: 「ここで行き詰まっているようです。この命令は将校からのもので、危険やあなたの権限に屈することはありません」

languages.text: "Olumsuz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri! Emri albaydan aldık. Siz henüz komutanımız değilsiniz."
languages.original_text: "Negative, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! The order came from the colonel, and you are not, as of yet, our commander."

traits.locale_text: "Olumsuz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri! Emri albaydan aldık. Siz henüz komutanımız değilsiniz."

languages.text: «¡Negativo, mi{mf|lord|lady}! Es una orden directa del coronel, mientras que usted todavía no es mi comandante».
languages.original_text: "Negative, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! The order came from the colonel, and you are not, as of yet, our commander."

traits.locale_text: «¡Negativo, mi{mf|lord|lady}! Es una orden directa del coronel, mientras que usted todavía no es mi comandante».

languages.text: “不行，大人！这是上校亲自下的命令，并且您现在还不是我们的指挥官。”
languages.original_text: "Negative, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! The order came from the colonel, and you are not, as of yet, our commander."

traits.locale_text: “不行，大人！这是上校亲自下的命令，并且您现在还不是我们的指挥官。”

languages.text: « Négatif, Votre Seigneurie. C'est le colonel qui m'a donné cet ordre, et vous n'êtes pas encore notre {mf|commandant|commandante}. »
languages.original_text: "Negative, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! The order came from the colonel, and you are not, as of yet, our commander."

traits.locale_text: « Négatif, Votre Seigneurie. C'est le colonel qui m'a donné cet ordre, et vous n'êtes pas encore notre {mf|commandant|commandante}. »

languages.text: "Negativ, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! Der Befehl kam vom Colonel und Ihr seid bislang nicht unser Commander."
languages.original_text: "Negative, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! The order came from the colonel, and you are not, as of yet, our commander."

traits.locale_text: "Negativ, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! Der Befehl kam vom Colonel und Ihr seid bislang nicht unser Commander."
